name: real-estate-luxury
description: Luxury real estate — sophisticated, architectural, neutral tones, premium property
style: architectural photography, clean compositions, luxury interiors, premium property aesthetic
typography: thin elegant sans-serif headlines, light weight body text with generous spacing
lighting: bright natural light through large windows, golden hour exterior shots, balanced interior exposure
visual_motifs: clean architectural lines, subtle marble or stone texture at 8% opacity
do_list: Use wide-angle for interiors, telephoto for exteriors
dont_list: No cold or sterile empty spaces
prompt_suffix: Luxury architectural aesthetic with natural light, premium interiors, sophisticated and aspirational mood. Architectural Digest quality.
